inputs.label: Sample mV Reading
inputs.businessContext: Millivolt reading of soil-water suspension from pH electrode

businessContext_i18n.en: Millivolt reading of soil-water suspension from pH electrode
businessContext_i18n.tr: pH elektrotundan toprak-su süspansiyonunun milivolt okuması
businessContext_i18n.de: Millivolt-Messwert der Boden-Wasser-Suspension von der pH-Elektrode
businessContext_i18n.fr: Lecture en millivolts de la suspension sol-eau de l'électrode pH
businessContext_i18n.es: Lectura en milivoltios de la suspensión suelo-agua del electrodo de pH

inputs.label: Reference mV Reading
inputs.businessContext: Millivolt reading of known pH buffer solution

businessContext_i18n.en: Millivolt reading of known pH buffer solution
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bilinen pH tampon çözeltisinin milivolt okuması
businessContext_i18n.fr: Lecture en millivolts d'une solution tampon de pH connu
businessContext_i18n.es: Lectura en milivoltios de la solución tampón de pH conocida

inputs.label: Buffer pH
inputs.businessContext: pH value of the reference buffer solution

businessContext_i18n.en: pH value of the reference buffer solution
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur du pH de la solution tampon de référence
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor de pH de la solución tampón de referencia

inputs.label: Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Temperature of the samples and buffers (assumed equal)

businessContext_i18n.en: Temperature of the samples and buffers (assumed equal)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Numunelerin ve tamponların sıcaklığı (eşit olduğu varsayılır)
businessContext_i18n.de: Temperatur der Proben und Puffer (als gleich angenommen)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Température des échantillons et des tampons (supposée égale)
businessContext_i18n.es: Temperatura de las muestras y tampones (se asume igual)

inputs.label: Slope %
inputs.businessContext: Electrode slope percentage relative to theoretical Nernstian slope (100% = 59.16 mV/pH at 25°C)

businessContext_i18n.en: Electrode slope percentage relative to theoretical Nernstian slope (100% = 59.16 mV/pH at 25°C)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Elektrod eğiminin teorik Nernst eğimine göre yüzdesi (%100 = 25°C'de 59.16 mV/pH)
businessContext_i18n.de: Elektrodensteigung in Prozent relativ zur theoretischen Nernst-Steigung (100% = 59,16 mV/pH bei 25°C)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de pente d'électrode par rapport à la pente nernstienne théorique (100 % = 59,16 mV/pH à 25 °C)
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de pendiente del electrodo respecto a la pendiente nernstiana teórica (100% = 59,16 mV/pH a 25°C)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
